secid.description: section id, will be used by JW Player to pass their info

pubid.description: publisher id, will be used by JW Player to pass their info

source.description: source of traffic, in JW Player case should be 'jwp'

pubdata.description: publisher data, will be used by JW Player to pass their info

video.description: video parameters which should be passed for no-mapping approach

video.mind.description: Minimum video ad duration in seconds.

video.maxd.description: Maximum video ad duration in seconds

video.linearity.description: Indicates if the impression must be linear, nonlinear, etc.

video.skip.description: Indicates if the player will allow the video to be skipped, where 0 = no, 1 = yes.

video.skipmin.description: Videos of total duration greater than this number of seconds can be skippable; only applicable if the ad is skippable.

video.skipafter.description: Number of seconds a video must play before skipping is enabled; only applicable if the ad is skippable.

video.api.description: List of supported API frameworks for this impression

video.startdelay.description: Indicates the start delay in seconds

video.playbackmethod.description: Playback methods that may be in use
